DISCOVERY, 302, AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE AUTHORIZATION AND RELEASE OF MEDICAL RECORDS, UPON ARGUMENT AND EVIDENCE PROVIDED BY WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA, INC. ("WHOLE FOODS") THAT IT HAS NOT BEEN SERVED, OR TIMELY SERVED A COPY OF MARIA CASTILLO ("CASTILLO'S") OPPOSITION, THIS MOTION IS HEREBY CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 1, 2016 IN DEPARTMENT 301. ALTHOUGH THE MOTION SHALL BE CALENDARED FOR 9 A.M., THIS MATTER WILL NOT BE HEARD, AND THE PARTIES NEED NOT APPEAR, IF AT ALL, UNTIL 10 A.M. CASTILLO SHALL SERVE UPON WHOLE FOODS A TRUE AND CORRECT COPY OF THE OPPOSITION AND RELATED PAPERS NO LATER THAN 5 P.M. ON JANUARY 13, 2016. WHOLE FOODS SHALL FILE AND SERVE AN AMENDED REPLY AND ANY RELATED PAPERS NO LATER THAN JANUARY 19, 2016. HARD COURTESY COPIES OF THE AMENDED REPLY SHALL BE SIMULTANEOUSLY SERVED VIA REGULAR MAIL ON JUDGE PRO TEM DOUGLAS ROBBINS AT 1 POST STREET, SUITE 800, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94104. JUDGE PRO TEM: DOUGLAS ROBBINS, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. EDWIN PAIRAVI OF THE PAIRAVI LAW, TEL. NO. 1-310-789-2063 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. JULIE D. WOOD THE SEYFARTH SHAW LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-397-2823 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendant Whole Foods Market California, Inc.'s ("Whole Foods'") Motion To Compel the Authorization and Release of Medical Records is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Whole Food's request for monetary sanctions is DENIED. All other requests for sanctions, if any, are DENIED. Moving party to prepare form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro tem; Douglas Robbins Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Off Calendar Jan-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. EDWIN PAIRAVI, ESQ. and SARADIN CHIIM, ESQ. of Pairavi Law, Tel No. 310-789-2063 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
Atty. JULIE D. WOOD, ESQ. of Seyfarth Shaw, Tel No. 415-397-2823 appearing for Defendant Whole Foods Market California.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court orders as follows: DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA, INC'S Motion To Compel Deposition Answers is granted. Moving party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel The Authorization And Release Of Medical Records; Memorandum Of Points &Amp; Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Continued To Feb-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET CALIFORNIA, INC.'S Motion To Compel The Authorization And Release Of Medical Records, upon argument and evidence provided by Whole Foods Market California, Inc. ("Whole Foods") that it has not been served, or timely served a copy of Maria Castillo ("Castillo's") Opposition, this Motion is hereby continued to February 1, 2016 in department 301. Although the Motion shall be calendared for 9 a.m., this matter will not be heard, and the Parties need not appear, if at all, until 10 a.m. Castillo shall serve upon Whole Foods a true and correct copy of the Opposition and related papers no later than 5 p.m. on January 13, 2016. Whole Foods shall file and serve an Amended Reply and any related papers no later than January 19, 2016. Hard courtesy copies of the Amended Reply shall be simultaneously served via regular mail on Judge Pro Tem Douglas Robbins at 1 Post Street, Suite 800, San Francisco, CA 94104. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
